utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each of them is fully specified with the details required: health_coverage (includes physical and mental health with costs), property_coverage (includes home/contents coverage with cost and features), travel_coverage (includes plan details and costs), additional_services (lists enhancement services and indicates cost inclusion), and total_budget (includes full monthly and annual breakdown). Therefore, all 5 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes three main policies: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Mental Health Plan for mental health, EliteHome Premium Coverage for property, and LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan for travel. We match these to the ground-truth ratings. For physical health, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' has a rating of 8. For mental health, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' also has a rating of 8 (no separate 'Standard Mental Health' version is listed, so it maps to the LifeFirst Standard Plan under mental health). For property, 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' has a rating of 10. For travel, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under travel insurance also has a rating of 7.
